description_long: This is a rectangular, three-drawer filing cabinet with a minimalist, modern design. The cabinet features clean, flat surfaces with no visible handles or decorative elements, giving it a sleek and utilitarian appearance. The front face is divided into three equal horizontal sections, each representing a drawer, while the sides and back are plain and unadorned. The cabinet is constructed from a solid, likely metal material, commonly used for durability and security in urban environments. Its neutral gray color allows it to blend seamlessly into various settings such as offices, garages, or public service areas. The overall build suggests it is sturdy and capable of supporting objects on its flat top surface.
description: A sleek, gray, three-drawer filing cabinet with a minimalist, handle-less design and a sturdy, solid build.
description_view_0: Front view showing three distinct horizontal drawers with clean, flat surfaces and no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, featureless vertical surface with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain, smooth surface.
